turn_info.content: The child is with us every other week and maybe that is why he treats him differently but my husband knows that it is causing problems in our relationship and refuses to change those behaviors. I just do not know what to do anymore.

turn_info.content: I suppose I could talk to his mother. But, I have reservations because I feel like she will side with him since it his her son.
